description:
Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'Lab_Results_OBX_Extractor' that receives HL7 ORU^R01 messages on TCP port 6661 (MLLP framing). The channel must use a JavaScript source transformer (Inbound: HL7 v2.x, Outbound: Raw) to iterate over all repeating OBX segments in each message and write one pipe-delimited line per OBX segment to /tmp/lab_results/obx_results.txt in append mode.

The output format for each OBX line must be:
OBX_SET_ID|LOINC_CODE|OBSERVATION_NAME|VALUE|UNITS|REFERENCE_RANGE|ABNORMAL_FLAG

Where:
- OBX_SET_ID = OBX.1
- LOINC_CODE = OBX.3.1
- OBSERVATION_NAME = OBX.3.2
- VALUE = OBX.5.1
- UNITS = OBX.6.1
- REFERENCE_RANGE = OBX.7
- ABNORMAL_FLAG = OBX.8

Process the following HL7 ORU^R01 message to verify the channel output:

MSH|^~\&|LAB_SYSTEM|MEMORIAL_HOSP|EHR_SYSTEM|MEMORIAL_HOSP|20240115103000||ORU^R01^ORU_R01|MSG00001|P|2.5.1|||AL|NEPID|1||MRN123456^^^MEMORIAL_HOSP^MR||DOE^JANE^M||19780422|F|||456 OAK AVE^^SPRINGFIELD^IL^62704||2175551234PV1|1|O|LAB^^^^||||1234^SMITH^ROBERT^J^MDORC|RE|ORD789|LAB456||CMOBR|1|ORD789|LAB456|58410-2^CBC WITH DIFFERENTIAL^LN|||20240115090000|||||||20240115093000||1234^SMITH^ROBERT^J^MD||||||20240115103000|||FOBX|1|NM|6690-2^WBC^LN||7.5|10*3/uL|4.5-11.0|N|||FOBX|2|NM|789-8^RBC^LN||4.82|10*6/uL|4.00-5.50|N|||FOBX|3|NM|718-7^HGB^LN||14.2|g/dL|12.0-16.0|N|||FOBX|4|NM|4544-3^HCT^LN||42.1|%|36.0-46.0|N|||FOBX|5|NM|787-2^MCV^LN||87.3|fL|80.0-100.0|N|||FOBX|6|NM|785-6^MCH^LN||29.5|pg|27.0-33.0|N|||FOBX|7|NM|786-4^MCHC^LN||33.7|g/dL|32.0-36.0|N|||FOBX|8|NM|777-3^PLT^LN||245|10*3/uL|150-400|N|||F

REST API: https://localhost:8443/api (credentials: admin/admin, header: X-Requested-With: OpenAPI). Ensure the output directory /tmp/lab_results/ exists inside the nextgen-connect container.
